'''Geric''' was an [[Sub-Adult Group/Legends|SAGroup]] member who was stationed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. He and two other SAGroup members brought [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Drake Lo'gaan]] to the [[Jrade District/Legends|Jrade District]] to join SAGroup.

{{Char-stub}}
